journey.name: Open History Drawer Journey
journey.description: Prueba abrir el Navigation Drawer del historial y verificar su contenido

actions.action: Verify that the app is showing the chat screen with the title "AI Chat"
Verify that the menu icon is visible in the top bar
Verify that the drawer opens and shows the history panel
Verify that the "Nueva" (New) button is visible
Verify that the list of conversations is visible (or empty state message)
